heading: Why trust this Las Vegas safety guide
intro: This guide is built from real experience in Las Vegas — knowing which risks are real for tourists, which are overstated, and what actually protects you during a trip to one of the world's most visited cities.

items.title: Tourist-relevant risks only
items.text: Las Vegas has specific tourist risks — resort fee deception, drink safety, unlicensed taxis, and petty theft. This guide focuses on what actually affects visitors, not citywide crime statistics.

items.title: Strip vs off-Strip assessed
items.text: The Strip itself is heavily surveilled and very safe. Off-Strip is a different story. This guide gives you the honest breakdown so you know when to relax and when to stay aware.

items.title: Financial safety included
items.text: Resort fees, taxi fare inflation, and casino ATM fees are covered alongside physical safety — because financial safety matters as much as personal safety in Vegas.

items.title: Current for 2026
items.text: Las Vegas is constantly changing. This guide reflects current conditions on the Strip, at Fremont Street, and in the surrounding areas — not impressions from years ago.

footer: If you want a clear, current, and honest safety guide for Las Vegas, this was built to give you exactly that.
